title: US agencies switch to OpenAI after White House orders Anthropic exit
description: Three more US cabinet-level agencies have switched to OpenAI after a White House directive ordered the phase-out of Anthropic’s AI tools, expanding a federal shift that began with the Pentagon and reshaping the government’s approach to artificial intelligence partnerships.
content: Three more U.S. cabinet-level agencies, ​the departments of State, Treasury and Health and Human Services, moved to cease use of Anthropic’s AI products ‌on Monday, joining the Pentagon in switching to rivals such as OpenAI under a new White House di... [3070 chars]
